title: The Largest Hydrogen Manufacturing Facility in the Middle East Will Be Located in KEZAD A, Abu Dhabi
content: KEZAD Group, the largest operator of integrated and purpose-built economic zones and Broaden Energy have announced the signing of a 50-year land lease agreement to establish a state-of-the-art manufacturing facility in KEZAD Area A (KEZAD Al Maâ€™mourah). The agreement was signed at the fourth edition of Make it in the Emirates (MIITE) in Abu Dhabi. This marks the first phase of Broaden Energyâ€™s new manufacturing complex, publicly announced in partnership with Abu Dhabi Department of Economic Development (ADDED) last year. It represents a major expansion of the companyâ€™s capabilities to locally manufacture hydrogen generation, refueling, and storage systems in the UAE and will be the first and largest facility of its type in the region.
author: Analysts Account
